subject: Validate: Build order list, create order, and table map pages
goal: Validate builder output for Build order list, create order, and table map pages

F-001: Waiter can create a new order by selecting menu items and assigning to a table
If table already has active order, waiter sees option to Tambah Pesanan
Additional items are appended to existing order and sent to kitchen
Order total updates automatically after adding items
Order appears on Kitchen Display within 2 seconds of submission
Order total is auto-calculated based on menu item prices and quantities
Special notes are visible to the chef on Kitchen Display
F-010: Visual grid showing all tables with color-coded status
Waiter can tap a table to create or view its active order
Table status updates automatically when order is created/paid
Owner can configure total number of tables
F-017: Cashier can cancel an unpaid order from order list

business_rules.rule: Order must have at least one menu item
Each order is linked to a specific table
If a table already has an active (unpaid) order, cashier can ADD items to that existing order
Additional items are appended to the same order with Tambahan label
Order total recalculated automatically after adding items
Order can be cancelled before payment (status -> cancelled)
Discount applied before PPN: Grand Total = (Subtotal - Discount) * (1 + PPN rate)

cross_domain_contracts.context: Waiter selects table, browses menu, creates order.
timing_notes: Stock deduction at order submission (D-001, D-030, D-064)
cross_domain_contracts.next_domain: kitchen receives order, inventory deducts stock

cross_domain_contracts.context: Kitchen marks order ready, waiter sees notification on S-002
